hero.text: Believe in the magic of beginnings.
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: Today you may feel a surge of energy that propels you to take on new challenges. Embrace this spirit and let your enthusiasm guide you.
aries.love: Your passion may ignite a spark in your relationships today. Communicate openly and let your feelings be known for better understanding.
aries.career: A project you have been working on can finally come to fruition. Teamwork and collaboration will lead to success.

taurus.general: You might find comfort in your routines today. It's an excellent time for self-care and nurturing your creative side.
taurus.love: Romantic gestures from your partner will warm your heart. Take a moment to appreciate the little things in your relationship.
taurus.career: Patience in the workplace will pay off. Focus on building strong relationships with colleagues for future benefits.

gemini.general: Curiosity will lead you to new insights today. Keep your mind open to fresh perspectives and ideas.
gemini.love: Your social nature will attract new connections. Embrace the fun and lighthearted approach to love in your life.
gemini.career: Networking opportunities may arise. Don't hesitate to reach out to others to share ideas and collaborate.

cancer.general: Emotions may run high today. Allow yourself to express what you feel and connect with loved ones for support.
cancer.love: A heart-to-heart conversation could strengthen your bond. Honesty will lead to deeper intimacy.
cancer.career: Trust your instincts when facing decisions at work. Your intuition will guide you to the right path.

leo.general: Your confidence shines brightly today. Show your true self and take the lead in social situations.
leo.love: Romance is in the air! Plan a special date that celebrates the unique spark you and your partner share.
leo.career: Your leadership skills will be recognized. Stand firm in your ideas and demonstrate your vision to others.

virgo.general: Organization will be key to your productivity today. Tackle tasks methodically for the best results.
virgo.love: Practicality in love will help you make grounded decisions. Discuss future plans with your partner.
virgo.career: Your attention to detail will set you apart. Make sure to highlight your accomplishments in discussions.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
professional.author: Norman Vaughan

professional.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
professional.author: Confucius

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
motivation.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

captions.text: Sometimes you win, sometimes you learn.
captions.author: John C. Maxwell

captions.text: Live the life you have imagined.
captions.author: Henry David Thoreau

captions.text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine—and shadows will fall behind you.
captions.author: Walt Whitman

captions.text: Life is not measured by the number of breaths we take, but by the moments that take our breath away.
captions.author: Maya Angelou

captions.text: In the end, we only regret the chances we didn't take.
captions.author: Lewis Carroll

captions.text: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
captions.author: Theodore Roosevelt

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The great growling engine of change – technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: The real problem is not whether machines think but whether men do.
tech.author: B.F. Skinner

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

fun.text: I’m on a whiskey diet. I’ve lost three days already.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won’t stop sending me KitKat ads.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I used to play piano by ear, but now I use my hands.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I’m reading a book on anti-gravity. It’s impossible to put down!
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith does not make things easy, it makes them possible.
faith.author: Luke 1:37

faith.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are. Know that there is something inside you that is greater than any obstacle.
faith.author: Christian D. Larson

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: Sometimes the smallest things take up the most room in your heart.
faith.author: Winnie the Pooh

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: The unexamined life is not worth living.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Time you enjoy wasting is not wasted time.
wisdom.author: Marthe Troly-Curtin

wisdom.text: In three words I can sum up everything I've learned about life: it goes on.
wisdom.author: Robert Frost

wisdom.text: Life isn’t about finding yourself. Life is about creating yourself.
wisdom.author: George Bernard Shaw
